message:
fix(server): retention edge case, TUI event test cleanup, and widget arithmetic safety

- retention.rs: fix edge case where pattern of just "*" or "**" was
  incorrectly handled; add early return when pattern core is empty
- tui_events.rs: remove ~900 lines of verbose VerbosityTier tests (moved
  to separate module); fix poisoned lock handling by using
  unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner()) instead of expect("lock"); fix test
  message IDs and server config for clarity
- tui_widgets.rs: fix unsafe integer truncation in HeatmapGrid label width
  calculation; fix floating-point division by zero risk in
  AmbientHealthInput.buffer_score by adding .max(0.001) denominator guard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
